tldr: Roadrunner is a viable hackathon concept but requires human review before build due to multi-page scope, new auth/infrastructure, XSS/LLM risks, and underspecified persistence/RLS/test plans.
decision_reason: min_confidence=4 (<8); has_high_risk=true (design, qa, security flagged high); all agents recommend revise; security XSS finding caps confidence at 4

summary_by_agent.eng: Solid hackathon architecture with clear MVP boundaries, but persistence, pivot, and nested RLS details underspecified.
summary_by_agent.design: Ambitious 6-screen MVP with coherent AI node flow, but states, hierarchy, and responsive/a11y strategy missing.
summary_by_agent.qa: Five critical paths identified but zero automated coverage; LLM eval gates needed before build.
summary_by_agent.security: New auth/infrastructure with RLS/Zod foundations, but XSS from AI markdown and prompt injection unmitigated.

key_findings: SECURITY: Sanitize AI markdown before render (rehype-sanitize); treat LLM output as untrusted
SECURITY: Rate-limit /api/ai/next-node; keep LLM keys server-only; scope service-role key usage
ENG: Define write-through contract: stream → validate → persist node → advance current_node_id atomically
ENG: Pivot must soft-archive orphaned subtrees; prevent duplicate decisions with idempotency key
ENG: Nested RLS policies for journey_nodes/choices via journeys.user_id join
DESIGN: Specify all UI states (empty journey, streaming interrupted, auth expired, fallback canned content)
DESIGN: Mobile-first responsive strategy required; keyboard/focus plan for choice panel
QA: Minimum smoke tests — RLS cross-user denial, AI fallback on parse failure, auth→onboarding E2E
QA: LLM eval suite for structured output (1-3 choices, valid JSON schema)
human_in_loop_reason_if_applicable: Multi-page scope (design high risk), new Supabase auth + infrastructure (security high risk), XSS vulnerability identified, min confidence 4/10 from security reviewer

findings: Node persistence timing undefined — map can drift from UI without write-through contract
Pivot semantics missing — orphaned subtrees corrupt visualization and XP
Nested RLS for journey_nodes/choices via journeys.user_id join not designed
Streak needs last_activity_at and qualifying activity definition
Streamed JSON must validate only after complete response, not partial chunks
Choice submission needs idempotency — UNIQUE(journey_id, node_id) on decisions
Onboarding interests → skill_catalog mapping unspecified
Node completion criteria mismatch between quiz/reflection and node_type enum

states_missing: map with zero or one node
findings: Node view packs lesson + choices + pivot without hierarchy rules
Dashboard vs map relationship undefined
Gamification placement and feedback patterns unspecified
AI fallback UX — user not informed canned vs AI-generated
Responsive strategy missing

qa.llm_eval_needed: next-node structured output eval, prompt guardrail regression, context-window eval, failure-mode eval for fallback
findings: No test strategy despite five critical paths
RLS cross-user isolation has no verification method
AI fallback trigger conditions unspecified
Streaming partial JSON and concurrent pivot untested

vulnerabilities.description: Untrusted AI markdown rendered without HTML sanitization

findings: Rate limiting and per-user LLM quotas not mentioned
Service-role vs anon key scoping not specified
RLS policy correctness for joins not verified
